name: before-ai
description: Before AI — fix the workflow before you automate it. A Socratic command that helps knowledge workers interrogate a real process from first principles and decide what to delete before deciding what to build.

plugins.name: before-ai
plugins.description: The /before-ai command — a one-question-at-a-time walkthrough that maps a workflow as it really runs, interrogates every step (real risk vs inherited ritual, politics, duplication; the cheapest control that still works), then runs the survivors through the four-question test (Volume · Pattern · Stakes · Verification). It asks; it never advises. You reach every conclusion and self-rate; you leave with a redesigned workflow and a decision report for your mentor. v1.0.0.
